The '''Skirmish on Ossus''' was a battle between [[Executor (Imperial rank)|Executor]] [[Sedriss QL]]'s forces and the [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knights]] [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]], [[Kam Solusar]], and their [[Ysanna/Legends|Ysanna]] allies. The skirmish saw the elimination of the [[Dark side adept/Legends|Dark Side Adepts]] Sedriss and Goir along with the ancient [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Ood Bnar]], and resulted in a mutual alliance between [[The Force/Legends|the Force]]-wielding Ysanna and the [[New Jedi Order]].

==History==
===Prelude===
Having been guided by a [[Holocron/Legends|holocron]] to [[Ossus/Legends|Ossus]], Skywalker and Solusar traveled to the planet on Skywalker's new ship, ''[[Jedi Explorer]]''. During the [[Old Republic era]], Ossus had been a center of Jedi learning. Then in [[3996 BBY]], during the [[Great Sith War/Legends|Sith War]], Ossus was devastated when the Sith caused the planet's sun to go supernova. As a result, Ossus was reduced to a barren world and was forgotten for millennia.<ref name="TEC" />

[[File:Probe_Ossus.jpg|thumb|left|150px|[[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] encountering a [[Probe droid/Legends|probe droid]].]]

When Skywalker and Solusar arrived, they were attacked by an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Probe droid/Legends|probe droid]] sent after them by Sedriss. However, the two Jedi defeated the automaton. They then traveled Ossus on their [[T-77 Experimental Airspeeder]]. During their journey, they passed through ruins and canyons and they discovered that the Jedi had been strong on Ossus.<ref name="DEII" />

They then encountered two [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] youths tied to a tree at the base of a canyon. Later Skywalker and Solusar would learn that the youths were [[Rayf Ysanna]] and [[Jem Ysanna]] and that they were members of the [[Ysanna/Legends|Ysanna]], a tribe of warrior-shamans who were the descendants of survivors of the destruction of Ossus. Luke freed the two youths though they thought he was trying to kill them.<ref name="DEII" />

They then encountered more Ysanna who rode on large beasts. The Ysanna—thinking that Skywalker and Solusar were enemies—attacked them with [[Concussion bow/Legends|concussion]]-fired arrows. This was further enforced by the fact that the Ysanna spoke only [[Ysannan/Legends|Ysannan]] while the two Jedi spoke only [[Galactic Basic Standard/Legends|Galactic Basic]].<ref name="DEII" />

These Ysanna used [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] [[Telekinesis/Legends|to guide]] their arrows to the target. Skywalker and Solusar were forced to defend themselves with their [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsabers]] as a result. Impressed by the skill the two Jedi displayed, the Ysanna stopped fighting.<ref name="DEII" />

[[File:YsannaOssus.jpg|thumb|The [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] encountering the [[Ysanna/Legends|Ysanna]].]]
The leader of the tribe, [[Chief/Legends|Chief]] [[Okko]], then confronted them with his Force abilities. The other Ysanna, including [[Murra (Ysanna)|Murra]], joined in, but stopped when they saw that the two Jedi were friends. Though Skywalker did not bring [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]], he was able to communicate with Chief Okko through the Force. Okko then realized that they were the long-lost [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knights]]. Unfortunately, the Chief's cry of wonder was interrupted by the arrival of a long-range [[Imperial hunter (starship)|Imperial hunter]].<ref name="DEII" />

===The Skirmish===
{{Quote|<nowiki></nowiki>''Curse'' you Jedi—I don't care if you're a ''million'' years old—!|Sedriss|audio=Sedriss-CurseYou.flac|<ref name="Dark Empire II (audio)">[[Dark Empire II (audio drama)|''Dark Empire II'' audio drama]]</ref>}}
[[File:Battle_of_Ossus_2.jpg|thumb|left|250px|The [[Neti/Legends|Neti]] [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Ood Bnar]] holding [[Sedriss QL]] moments before his death.]]

Upon landing, the vessel deployed a contingent of specially-trained [[Stormtrooper/Legends|Stormtroopers]] which were powered by the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side of the Force]]. However, the Ysanna and the two Jedi fought them. During the confrontation, the Force-sensitive Ysanna were pitted against the best Stormtroopers in the Imperial arsenal. With the help of Skywalker and Solusar, the Stormtroopers were defeated.<ref name="DEII" />

However, Sedriss and his cohort [[Vill Goir]] were still alive and they confronted the two Jedi Knights. However, Solusar defeated his former comrade Vill Goir for all time while Luke used the Force to hurl Sedriss to his knees. In desperation, Sedriss took the Ysanna girl Jem hostage.<ref name="DEII" />

Unfortunately for him, he was standing behind the same tree the two Ysanna had been tied to and the tree was in reality the [[Neti/Legends|Neti]] [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Ood Bnar]]. Ood used his roots to grab Sedriss and then used the Force to disintegrate and destroy Sedriss. Unfortunately, Odd Bnar was killed in the process.<ref name="DEII" />

On the positive side, the explosion revealed a vault which contained a wealth of ancient Jedi lightsabers. Also, Ood Bnar left a [[Ood Bnar's descendant|descendant]] behind. Skywalker, Solusar, Jem, and Rayf then took a lightsaber each from the treasure vault. They then discovered that the antiques were still operational. With this, Skywalker took Jem and Rayf Ysanna with him as students to start a [[new Jedi Order]].<ref name="DEII" />

==Behind the scenes==
The Skirmish on Ossus first appeared in the issue [[Dark Empire II 3|''Dark Empire II'' 3]] of the ''[[Star Wars: Dark Empire]]'' series of comics. The battle was conceived and written by authors [[Tom Veitch]], illustrated and colored by colorist [[Cam Kennedy]]. Veitch used this as part of the rising action of the plot; introducing the Neti Jedi Ood Bnar while killing off Vill Goir and Sedriss.

The Skirmish on Ossus would eventually be featured in the [[Dark Empire II (audio drama)|''Dark Empire II'' audio drama]], which witnessed the skirmish take on a whole new personality through the voice acting of [[Jim Ward (voice actor)|Jim Ward]] (Sedriss and Kam Solusar), [[John Cygan]] (Skywalker, Goir and Okko) and [[Glynnis Talken Campbell|Glynnis Talken]] (Jem Ysanna).

The audio drama of ''Dark Empire'' differs from the original comic ''Dark Empire II'' in regards to several aspects of the chronology of events in the battle. In the audio version, Sedriss is bested in duel with Skywalker, rather than being pushed back up against the tree-like Ood Bnar by the Force.
